name: Lendlease Group
analysis: LLC has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 45% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$3.1700, stop A$2.4750, target A$3.4900 (0.46:1) — then trail it.
